programme.title: Match 6 - Roland Garros - 2026 World Feed
programme.desc: Roland-Garros 2026 The world’s best players return to the clay courts of Paris for the 125th edition of Roland-Garros, the second Grand Slam of the season. From opening-round battles to the iconic finals on Court Philippe-Chatrier, the tournament delivers two weeks of elite tennis, drama and endurance on the sport’s most demanding surface.

programme.title: L.D.U. Quito (ECU) vs Always Ready (BOL) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage - MD6
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Premier Padel Highlights 2026 - Buenos Aires P1
programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.title: Panenka: Game Changer | E1
programme.desc: A documentary about Antonin Panenka, the man who invented a new way of taking penalties.

programme.title: Peñarol (URU) vs Santa Fe (COL) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage - MD6
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.desc: Arsenal have lost just one of their 19 Premier League games against Burnley, going down 1-0 at home in December 2020. programme.title: Lille vs Auxerre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Auxerre are the current Ligue 1 side against whom Lille have their highest percentage of defeats, but LOSC are unbeaten in their last nine top-flight meetings with AJA. programme.title: France vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 2
programme.desc: France have never lost against Morocco, with all five of their previous meetings coming in friendlies. The most recent encounter was a 2-2 draw in Saint-Denis in November 2007. France have alternated between victory and defeat in their six World Cup meetings with African nations, losing 1-0 against Tunisia last time out in this year's group stage.

programme.title: Argentina vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 1
programme.desc: This is the third World Cup meeting between Argentina and Croatia, and first in the knockout stages. Argentina won 1-0 in 1998, before Croatia's 3-0 win in the 2018 edition in Russia. Argentina are looking to reach the World Cup final for the sixth time, a figure bettered only by Germany. They've never been eliminated at the semi-final stage before

programme.title: Croatia vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 3rd Place
programme.desc: This is the second meeting between Croatia and Morocco at this World Cup, having played out a 0-0 draw on MD1. Croatia were restricted to five shots, their fewest ever in a World Cup match. Croatia have kept a clean sheet in all three of their previous World Cup matches against African sides, beating Cameroon 4-0 in 2014, Nigeria 2-0 in 2018, and d

programme.title: Argentina vs France - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Final
programme.desc: Argentina are competing in their sixth World Cup final, with only Germany participating in more. They're looking to win the trophy for a third time along with 1978 and 1986, but defeat would see them with the joint-most World Cup final losses in history. France have reached the World Cup final for a fourth time, all since 1998. This is twice as ma

This series provides key previews, team analysis and player profiles of the greatest show on earth.

programme.title: Iva Jovic (USA) vs Emma Navarro (USA) - Day 5 - Court 14 - Roland Garros 2026
programme.desc: Roland-Garros 2026 The world’s best players return to the clay courts of Paris for the 125th edition of Roland-Garros, the second Grand Slam of the season. programme.title: Race 1 - FIA European Truck Championship - Misano Round -2026
programme.desc: The weekend opens with a straight fight from qualifying pace. A clean launch, disciplined braking into Turn 1, and strong exits onto the short straights can turn grid spot into podium. With heavy machines and cold brakes, early laps are risk-reward; settle quickly, manage water and brake temps, and bank the first big haul of points.

programme.title: beIN SPORTS XTRA
programme.desc: beIN SPORTS XTRA For Live And Exclusive Coverage of Premuim Sporting Events

programme.title: Race 2 - FIA European Truck Championship - Misano Round -2026
programme.desc: Reverse-grid stakes raise the tension, rewarding quick racecraft and clean overtakes. Drivers exploit the tow up to Dunlop and pressure rivals into track-limits errors. Penalties loom for contact, so precision matters. Teams tweak pressures and brake balance after Race 1 data; a bold move at the Chicane can unlock the win and momentum.

programme.title: Race 3 - FIA European Truck Championship - Misano Round -2026
programme.desc: Back to outright pace as qualifying form returns to the fore. By now rubbered-in lines improve traction, but rising temps stress cooling and brakes on the 4.185 km lap. Race rhythm and patience through the infield are key; defend smartly, attack decisively, and protect tyres for late-race sprints to the line.
